payload.answer: I found a conflict: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. I did not update the memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to Sara with a conflicting family relationship. Existing memory says Sara is the user's daughter; input says Sara is the user's niece. There is not enough information to determine whether this is the same Sara, a correction, or a different person named Sara.

details: Conflict detected between existing and new family relationship.

repair_options: Clarify that the existing memory is wrong and Sara is your niece, not your daughter.
Clarify that there are two different people named Sara: one is your daughter and one is your niece.
Clarify that Sara has both roles in your family context, if applicable.
